name: description
label: Description
default:
This November, intelligence becomes part of your everyday with three new capabilities built to lighten your workload. ROLLER iQ is your AI-powered assistant that turns venue data into instant answers. Price Rules automates pricing to help you fill more sessions, effortlessly. And Channel Management helps you expand your audience through seamless connections with major booking platforms.

Watch the video to see ROLLER's CEO and Founder, Luke Finn, talk about why this launch is so special to us and what it means for the attractions community.
